Package org.example.domain

Class AppointmentSlot

java.lang.Object
org.example.domain.AppointmentSlot
public class AppointmentSlot extends Object
Represents appointment slot in the system.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AppointmentSlot(String time)
    Creates a new appointment slot object with the given values.
    AppointmentSlot(LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
    Creates a new appointment slot object with the given values.

    Checks whether booked is true.
    boolean

    Checks whether this slot is future compared to reference time.

    Checks whether this slot is future based on current time.

    Checks whether this slot matches a user selection.

      date - slot date
      time - slot time

      Checks whether booked is true.
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Checks whether available is true.
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

      public boolean isFutureSlot()
      Checks whether this slot is future based on current time.
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

    • isFutureComparedTo

      public boolean isFutureComparedTo(LocalDateTime referenceTime)
      Checks whether this slot is future compared to reference time.
      Parameters:
      referenceTime - time value used by this method
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

    • matchesSelection

      public boolean matchesSelection(String selection)
      Checks whether this slot matches a user selection.
      Parameters:
      selection - selection text from UI input
      Returns:
      true when the action is valid or successful, otherwise false

    • book

      public void book()
      Marks this slot as booked.

    • release

      public void release()
      Marks this slot as available again.
